name: plugin-toolkit
description: Plugin/skill development + maintenance toolkit. /skill-heal audits a plugin's skill set against current best practices. /plugin-scaffold bootstraps a new plugin with proper structure. /version-bump cascades version updates across plugin.json + marketplace.json + bundle + RELEASE-NOTES. /docs-audit cross-checks CLAUDE.md + README + marketplace.json against disk state. /code-glossary builds a functionality glossary + DRY audit for any codebase: a deterministic Python engine (Python/TS/JS/C# via AST + tree-sitter) indexes, fingerprints 5 signals, and clusters duplicates; in-session sub-agents label, review clusters, and substrate-verify. Writes GLOSSARY.yaml (frozen schema) + GLOSSARY.md; `runner diff` tracks duplication drift between runs; `runner map` renders MAP.md — a functionality map (mermaid module graph + lossless machine index) consulted before designing or building; `runner coupling` enforces DECOUPLED by measuring coupling — scope-aware call graph from records, threshold-free binary facts (cross-module cycles + reach-ins into a module's internals), `--fail-on-violation` CI gate, COUPLING.yaml names each violation file:function for substrate-verification. /dry-refactor (v3 MVP) turns extractable glossary clusters into reviewable refactor plans: 7 pre-flight gates + dry-run helper/edit-plan output, zero source writes. Also powers essense-flow's /organize + /glossary phases. Composable - skills can invoke each other and integrate with @ship.
